signals.headline: **Strait of Hormuz:** Iran agreed to reopen this critical passage, which handles roughly 20 percent of global oil supply
signals.raw: **Strait of Hormuz:** Iran agreed to reopen this critical passage, which handles roughly 20 percent of global oil supply and had been closed, driving fuel prices up across Europe and the U.S.[2]

signals.raw: **Peace negotiations ongoing:** On April 11, U.S. Vice President JD Vance, Trump's special envoy Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner arrived in Islamabad for talks with Iranian officials, including Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi.[1]

signals.headline: **Ceasefire violations reported:** Both sides have violated the ceasefire since its declaration, though specific inciden
signals.raw:
**Ceasefire violations reported:** Both sides have violated the ceasefire since its declaration, though specific incidents are not detailed in available reports.[1]

This represents a significant de-escalation from Trump's threats on April 7 morning, when he warned "a whole civilization will die tonight" if no deal was reached.[2]

signals.headline: Ethereum Foundation Staked 70,000 ETH ($143M), Easing Sell Pressure | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Staked 70,000 ETH ($143M), Easing Sell Pressure | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The staking reduces circulating supply amid ETH price recovery to ~$2,184–$2,250, with on-chain data showing record Wrapped ETH wallet growth (32k new wallets, 16x average).[1][7] Combined with $11.6B net inflows to U.S. spot ETH ETFs, this supports bullish signals and could shift markets predicting ETH
